{props.isLoading ? (
  <div className="space-y-6">
    <div className="h-40 animate-pulse rounded-xl border border-border bg-muted/30" />
    <div className="h-24 animate-pulse rounded-xl border border-border bg-muted/30" />
  </div>
) : props.notFound ? (
  <div className="rounded-xl border border-border bg-muted/30 p-8 text-center">
    <p className="font-medium text-foreground">Vendor not found</p>
    <p className="mt-1 text-muted-foreground text-sm">
      This vendor doesn't exist or is no longer available.
    </p>
    <a
      href="/vendors"
      className="mt-4 inline-block text-primary text-sm underline hover:opacity-80"
    >
      Browse all vendors
    </a>
  </div>
) : (
  <div className="space-y-8">
    {/* Banner */}
    {props.vendor.banner && (
      <div className="h-48 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border bg-muted">
        <img
          src={props.vendor.banner}
          alt=""
          className="h-full w-full object-cover"
        />
      </div>
    )}

    {/* Header */}
    <div className="flex items-start gap-5">
      {props.vendor.logo ? (
        <div className="h-20 w-20 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border bg-muted">
          <img
            src={props.vendor.logo}
            alt={props.vendor.name}
            className="h-full w-full object-contain p-1"
          />
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="flex h-20 w-20 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-muted">
          <span className="font-bold text-3xl text-muted-foreground/50">
            {props.vendor.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
          </span>
        </div>
      )}
      <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
        <h1 className="font-bold text-foreground text-2xl">{props.vendor.name}</h1>
        {props.location && (
          <p className="mt-0.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm">{props.location}</p>
        )}
        {props.vendor.website && (
          <a
            href={props.vendor.website}
            target="_blank"
            rel="noopener noreferrer"
            className="mt-1 inline-block text-primary text-sm hover:underline"
          >
            {props.vendor.website.replace(/^https?:\/\//, "")}
          </a>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* Description */}
    {props.vendor.description && (
      <div className="prose prose-sm max-w-none text-muted-foreground">
        <p>{props.vendor.description}</p>
      </div>
    )}

    {/* Products */}
    {props.products.length > 0 && (
      <div>
        <h2 className="mb-4 font-semibold text-foreground text-lg">Products</h2>
        <div className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
          {props.products.map((product) => (
            <a
              key={product.id}
              href={`/products/${product.productId}`}
              className="rounded-xl border border-border bg-card p-4 transition-all hover:border-foreground/20 hover:shadow-sm"
            >
              <p className="font-mono text-muted-foreground text-xs">
                {product.productId.slice(0, 12)}…
              </p>
            </a>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    )}

    <div className="border-t border-border pt-4">
      <a
        href="/vendors"
        className="text-muted-foreground text-sm hover:text-foreground"
      >
        ← Back to all vendors
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
)}
